# Afshan PN — Portfolio
# https://www.afshanpn.online

> Afshan PN is an aspiring AI Developer and Data Science enthusiast from Kodungallur, Thrissur, Kerala, India. This is her personal portfolio website showcasing skills, projects, services, and contact information.

## About

Afshan PN is a passionate AI Developer and Data Science enthusiast driven by curiosity for how intelligent systems can transform the world. She completed an internship at Excape AI — India's First AI Ecosystem — as an AI Developer Intern, gaining hands-on experience developing intelligent solutions and working with real-world datasets.

- Name: Afshan PN
- Role: AI Developer Intern
- Company: Excape AI (India's First AI Ecosystem)
- Location: Kodungallur, Thrissur, Kerala, India
- Email: afshanpn2005@gmail.com
- Status: Available for opportunities

## Projects

### Real Estate Price Analysis
A comprehensive machine learning project analyzing real estate market trends and predicting property prices using regression models. Involved data cleaning, EDA, feature engineering, and model building.
- Technologies: Python, Scikit-learn, Pandas, Matplotlib
- GitHub: https://github.com/Afshan005/uae-real-estate-price-analysis

### College-Based Project System
A smart college management platform built to streamline academic workflows — from attendance tracking to project submission and grading. Integrates AI-driven recommendations.
- Technologies: Python, Machine Learning, Flask, MySQL
- GitHub: https://github.com/Afshan005/ai-integrated-collage-portal-

### Job Recommendation System
An intelligent job recommendation engine using NLP and collaborative filtering to match job seekers with relevant opportunities.
- Technologies: Python, NLP, Scikit-learn, Pandas
- GitHub: https://github.com/Afshan005/Job-Recommendation-AI

## Services

1. **Machine Learning Models** — Design, train, and deploy custom ML models
2. **Data Analysis & Insights** — Transform raw data into meaningful insights
3. **AI Solution Development** — End-to-end development of intelligent AI applications (Most Popular)
4. **Data Visualization** — Craft stunning, interactive visualizations
5. **Python Development** — Build robust Python applications and automation scripts
6. **AI Consulting** — Strategic guidance on integrating AI and data science
